title: Oh My Donation! (OMD)
description: Run defined minecraft console commands upon receiving donations!
body:
The mod is CLIENT ONLY!


This mod integrates with various donation services for streamers and runs the command specified in config file dependent on donation amount.


Currently four services are supported:

- **[WSS, REST] donationalerts.com**
- **[WSS, REST] donatepay.ru**
- **[REST] local file**
- **[WSS] GoodGame.ru** (since version 2.1.5)
- **[WSS] DonateX.gg** (since version 2.1.6)
 

Some services support WSS integration, meaning that the delay between donation and action is quite small (about 1 second). Others just rely on regular timed polling.

All services but local file require some kind of authentication. Use this website: https://cwelth.com/omd/index.php to get needed tokens.

Keep in mind: **I don't store ANY of your data!** Website is only needed to obtain the oauth keys to your donation services.

 

If you want me to integrate another donation service, please write a comment about it, and I'll do my best to add the support for it.
